text: I was trying to log in, but it just keeps loading forever and my internet is fine. Also, I don't remember when I last changed my password, is that a problem?

hey, my account locked after i tried to change my email addres, it says invalid access, what can i do?

I have to say I'm really frustrated with my recent experience. I've reached out multiple times about an issue and haven't received any follow-up. It feels like I'm being ignored, and that's really not what I expected from your service.

I was wondering if there are any scalability options for your platform, especially for a small startup like mine, but I couldn't find much info on the website. Are there specific plans that cater to smaller businesses or is it all just aimed at larger enterprises? It would be great to have some clarity on that.

Hey, so I kinda forgot my password and I tried to reset it but I don't think the email is coming through, I mean, I checked my spam and nothing. It's really frustrating, can someone please help me get back in?

I'm really disappointed because I paid for the premium version of your service, but I'm still unable to access the features that were promised to me. It's been weeks now, and despite reaching out multiple times, I feel like I'm just being given the runaround. Also, I noticed that the app keeps crashing whenever I try to use the new tools that were advertised, and honestly, this is not what I expected when I signed up. What is going on?
